sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40200" key="e)pimh/qeia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιμήθ-εια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n40200.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">second thoughts, afterthoughts</tr_>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προμήθεια</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
